foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Couinaud segmental anatomy is critical for living donor hepatectomy planning and graft size matching

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Decompensated cirrhosis with portal hypertension (MELD scoring) is the primary indication for transplant listing

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Milan criteria determine transplant eligibility for HCC — curative option for early-stage tumors in cirrhotic livers

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Fulminant hepatic failure from amoebic liver abscess may rarely require emergent transplant evaluation

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Secondary biliary cirrhosis from chronic obstruction can progress to end-stage liver disease requiring transplant

objectives: SU13.1: Describe the immunological basis of organ transplantation
SU13.2: Discuss the Principles of immunosuppressive therapy. Enumerate
IM5.18: Enumerate the indications for hepatic transplantation
integration: This superspecialty-level roadmap connects Liver Transplant Indications across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
